title: More Nonsense Limerick 93
content:
There was an old person of Shoreham,
    Whose habits were marked by decorum;
    He bought an Umbrella, 
    And sate in the cellar,
    Which pleased all the people of Shoreham.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 93"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
